details.test: Task 1: Save high-budget fintech React Native mobile app case study to favorites
Task 2: Submit estimate request for B2B SaaS web application
Task 3: Choose cheapest monthly plan with mobile app maintenance and submit inquiry
Task 4: Add two recent high-impact case studies to comparison
Task 5: Find recent React Native performance blog post and subscribe to newsletter
Task 6: Request consultation with most experienced Python backend engineer in Europe
Task 7: Request 2-week UX discovery workshop for team of 5 starting 2026-04-15
Task 8: Request project similar to large AWS case study with 6+ team
Task 9: Select three key services and submit combined RFP
